calendar.matters:
PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-22-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-21-2023 Continued To Mar-22-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-14-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar May-24-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-11-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jason Chang, via ZOOM, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court and Mr. Chang discuss and confirm what his duties and responsibilities will be if the court grants his petition, especially those requiring a previous court order. The court then confirms with Mr. Chang that the only asset of the estate is the real property and confirms that it is separate property.

After additional discussion, the Court grants the Petition for Letters of Administration. Wayman Chang is appointed as Administrator of the estate with limited authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Frank Mahoney III, is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on filing Inventory and Appraisal is set for May-24-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Mr. Chang is advised that if an Inventory and Appraisal is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar. Status on close of estate is set for Feb-14-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Chang is advised that if a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: G. Bastain. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-21-2021 Continued To Jan-11-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
